new_issues_created.description: SEC-3.5.5: Claims dome site 'never identifies which four' refined predictions — FACTUALLY WRONG for V51.0. Predictions page explicitly lists W019, W020, W024, W027.
SEC-3.5.5: Version confusion — claims headline says '0 falsified' but V51.0 says '4 Refined (test windows)'. The '0 falsified' was V50.6.
SEC-3.5.5: Missing individual analysis of W019/W020/W024/W027 — each tells different story (formula bug, mechanism inversion, test window excuses). Generic 'goalposts moved' is weaker.
SEC-3.5.5: Version-dependent terminology (V50.6 '0 Falsified' → V50.10 '4 Falsified' → V51.0 '4 Refined') reveals audience-targeted communication strategy. Not exploited in our review.
